mnemonics: MOTHER - Many Others Understand The Hidden Equivalence Rules
keyPoints: Commutative Law: Association of operators does not change the result
Associative Law: Grouping of operators does not change the result
Distributive Law: Operator can be distributed over other operators
Identity Law: Certain values (0 and 1) act as identity elements
Complement Law: A value and its complement are equivalent
Idempotent Law: A value repeated any number of times equals itself
Annihilation Law: A value and 1 are equivalent, 0 and value are equivalent
